indicators.name: large dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is too large for a comfortable computer workstation and lacks a dedicated surface for a keyboard and mouse.

indicators.name: white chairs
indicators.rationale: The white chairs are not designed for extended computer use and do not provide ergonomic support.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring can be slippery and may cause discomfort when standing or walking.

indicators.name: chandelier lighting
indicators.rationale: Chandelier lighting may cause glare on computer screens and is not suitable for focused work.

indicators.name: open layout
indicators.rationale: The open layout allows for potential distractions and does not provide a private workspace.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large dining table and lack of ergonomic seating make it difficult to set up a proper workstation. The hard flooring and chandelier lighting also pose potential problems for extended computer use. The open layout further undermines privacy and focus.
